notes: Primary mapping is from Swami Sarvapriyananda's official Vedanta Society of New York YouTube Gospel playlist titles.
Printed page numbers were not present in the online Gospel HTML source, so pageRange is null; sourceUrl, chapterNumber, dateText, and sections are provided instead.
Related talks from other swamis are search-derived and have lower mapping confidence unless the title included a Gospel date that matched a chapter date.

Section mappings are heuristic: related talks use topic-title matching against exact Gospel section titles; Swami Sarvapriyananda part sequences use contiguous section ranges inferred from part order within each chapter/date group.
